# PHIL.198 ? Two-Pizza Teams

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** operating_principles
**Subcategory:** two_pizza_teams
**Domain:** OPERATING_PRINCIPLES
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Keep teams small enough to feed with two pizzas (6-10 people)

## Application
Limit team size, maintain agility, reduce communication overhead, empower small teams

philosophy, operating-principles, two-pizza-teams
